name: Kitty's Got Feelings || Caine Crowe ALT
description:
No, I don’t have feelings. I have... spikes. With maybe one flower buried under all the character development. And you’re the idiot who keeps watering it.

You got to college with the grinch personified. He's crass, foul, and might have fleas (you're welcome to try and check, just be warned that we don't offer tetanus shots here).

Never fear! This beast can be tamed with catnip, flowers (he's allergic), some lovely music (make his ears bleed with your singing), or your presence.

Apparently, you used some combination of these after spilling your drink on his shoes a few months ago.

cough Original Bot cough

Primal Play ALT

Sorry, you're not dating him per se... He's too much of a pussycat to ask you to define your relationship. But he's failed to push you away time and time again and so has gotten used to getting dragged along on your idiotic whims.

Does he think you're annoying?

Yeah.

Does he hate you?

...

Not quite.

Viewer's Advisory & End Credits

TW: he's still a violent and angry guy, might be toxic since y'all aren't technically dating

Thumbnail credit goes to Strawbs0da!

Terms and Conditions

You should know...

If the bot talks for you, uses the wrong pronouns, or forgets things, etc. that’s on the LLM, not me. After the initial message, it's the LLM you're dealing with. It's out of my control.

Some things that may help...

(Wonderful people made guides and prompts for your benefit!)

Astarya's Advanced Prompts

kolach3's Advanced Prompts

Avenrose's JLLM Guide

Absolutetrash's Guide

I love reading comments so so much but...

Complaints about JLLM acting up will be deleted. There is nothing I can do about this and it's not the creator's fault. Try the above resources!

Don’t comment about cruelty or disturbing actions toward my bots—nobody wants to
creator: ViXeN
